ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broader research project */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Main goal of the experiment */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the standard protocol followed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current state of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Academic or professional title */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phenotypes" (
  "phenotype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phenotype record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the phenotype data is related to */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific sample */,
  "plate" INTEGER /* Plate number used in the experiment */,
  "row" INTEGER /* Row number of the sample on the plate */,
  "column" INTEGER /* Column number of the sample on the plate */,
  "growth_yield" REAL /* Growth yield measurement */,
  "generation_time" REAL /* Time taken for the organism to complete one generation */,
  "population_doublings" REAL /* Number of population doublings observed */,
  "baseline_measure" REAL /* Baseline measurement for comparison */,
  "colony_size_48h" REAL /* Size of the colony after 48 hours */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for phenotypic data */,
  "replicate_number" INTEGER /* Identifies the replicate number for repeated measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phenotype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phenotypes_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phenotypes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the sample is associated with */,
  "organism_type" TEXT /* Type of organism (e.g., yeast, bacteria) */,
  "sample_source" TEXT /* Source from which the sample was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Identifies the specific strain of the organism */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genetic makeup of the sample */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Where the sample is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the treatment is associated with */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment applied (e.g., heat shock, chemical exposure) */,
  "treatment_duration" REAL /* Duration of the treatment in hours */,
  "treatment_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the treatment agent */,
  "treatment_protocol" TEXT /* Detailed description or reference to the treatment protocol */,
  "control_group" INTEGER /* Indicates if the treatment is for a control group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the result is associated with */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings from the experiment */,
  "conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusions drawn from the experimental data */,
  "data分析方法" TEXT /* Methods used for data analysis */,
  "statistical_significance" REAL /* P-value or other statistical significance measures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment related to the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who logged the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., sample collected, treatment applied) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, technician) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Securely stored password hash */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_uploads" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file upload */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the file is related to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the uploaded file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., data file, report) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file in bytes */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_uploads_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
